name: Personal Assistant Pack
description: Personal Assistant Pack — Knowledge pack with curated tool installation instructions for Google Workspace. Teaches agents which tools exist and how to install them. Not automation.
author: CertainLogic

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available components and their status

commands.name: triage
commands.description: Score messages by priority and suggest actions

args.name: input
args.description: Path to JSON file with messages

commands.name: draft
commands.description: Generate a reply draft for a conversation thread

args.name: tone
args.description: Tone variant: concise, detailed, apologetic, assertive

commands.name: schedule
commands.description: Check calendar conflicts and suggest slots

commands.name: followup
commands.description: Set a tracked follow-up with deadline

args.name: topic
args.description: Short description of the follow-up topic
